ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "salt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical salt used in the experiment */,
  "target_temperature" INTEGER /* Target temperature for the experiment */,
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actual temperature during the experiment */,
  "initial_concentration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the initial concentration of the reactant */,
  "final_concentration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the final concentration of the reactant */,
  "initial_activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the initial activity of the reactant */,
  "final_activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the final activity of the reactant */,
  "volume_ratio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volume ratio of the reactant */,
  "loading_time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loading time of the reactant */,
  "removal_time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the removal time of the reactant */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., kinetics, thermodynamics) */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, canceled) */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "reactant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific reactant used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_final_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("final_activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_loading_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("loading_time_id") REFERENCES loading_times ("loading_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_salt_id FOREIGN KEY ("salt_id") REFERENCES salts ("salt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_final_concentration_id FOREIGN KEY ("final_concentration_id") REFERENCES concentrations ("concentration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_initial_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("initial_activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_removal_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("removal_time_id") REFERENCES removal_times ("removal_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_volume_ratio_id FOREIGN KEY ("volume_ratio_id") REFERENCES volume_ratios ("volume_ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_temperature_id FOREIGN KEY ("temperature_id") REFERENCES temperatures ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_initial_concentration_id FOREIGN KEY ("initial_concentration_id") REFERENCES concentrations ("concentration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salts" (
  "salt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical salt */,
  "salt_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical salt */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the salt */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chemical salt */,
  "molar_mass" REAL /* Molar mass of the salt */,
  "solubility" TEXT /* Solubility of the salt in water or other solvents */,
  "hazard_class" TEXT /* Hazard class of the salt (e.g., flammable, toxic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperatures" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature */,
  "temperature_value" REAL /* Value of the temperature */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit used for the temperature */,
  "temperature_source" TEXT /* Source of the temperature measurement (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "temperature_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the temperature measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperatures_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concentrations" (
  "concentration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concentration */,
  "initial_concentration" REAL /* Initial concentration of the reactant */,
  "final_concentration" REAL /* Final concentration of the reactant */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit used for the concentration */,
  "concentration_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the concentration (e.g., titration, spectrophotometry) */,
  "concentration_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the concentration measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concentration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concentrations_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "initial_activity" REAL /* Initial activity of the reactant */,
  "final_activity" REAL /* Final activity of the reactant */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit used for the activity */,
  "activity_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the activity (e.g., electrode, chemical reaction) */,
  "activity_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the activity measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volume_ratios" (
  "volume_ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume ratio */,
  "volume_ratio_value" REAL /* Value of the volume ratio */,
  "volume_ratio_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the volume ratio */,
  "volume_ratio_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the volume ratio measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_ratio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loading_times" (
  "loading_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loading time */,
  "loading_time_value" INTEGER /* Value of the loading time */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit used for the loading time */,
  "loading_time_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the loading time */,
  "loading_time_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the loading time measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loading_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loading_times_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "removal_times" (
  "removal_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each removal time */,
  "removal_time_value" INTEGER /* Value of the removal time */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit used for the removal time */,
  "removal_time_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the removal time */,
  "removal_time_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the removal time measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("removal_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_removal_times_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "unit_conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimenters" (
  "experimenter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimenter */,
  "experimenter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the experimenter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the experimenter */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the experimenter belongs to */,
  "experimenter_role" TEXT /* Role of the experimenter (e.g., lead, assistant) */,
  "experimenter_status" TEXT /* Status of the experimenter (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experimenter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment log */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment conducted */,
  "experimenter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimenter who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the experiment */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the log entry (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experimenter_id FOREIGN KEY ("experimenter_id") REFERENCES experimenters ("experimenter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment analyzed */,
  "kinetic_parameter" TEXT /* Kinetic parameter derived from the experiment */,
  "thermodynamic_parameter" TEXT /* Thermodynamic parameter derived from the experiment */,
  "statistical_significance" TEXT /* Statistical significance of the results */,
  "model_fitting" TEXT /* Model fitting used for analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., software, manual calculation) */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "experimenter_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first experimenter in the collaboration */,
  "experimenter_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second experimenter in the collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project they are collaborating on */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "collaboration_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_experimenter_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("experimenter_id_2") REFERENCES experimenters ("experimenter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_experimenter_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("experimenter_id_1") REFERENCES experimenters ("experimenter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment audited */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Person who made the change */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Status of the audit (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "audit_source" TEXT /* Source of the audit entry (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
